guardEvidence.howCaught: The only self-triggered emit added is the high-stakes buffer-drop operator notice, emitted with a FIXED attention id 'agent:provenance-highstakes-drop'. createAttentionItem coalesces by id, so repeated drops under sustained disk-stall pressure converge to exactly ONE operator item (steady-state bound = 1 per condition). The emit is a passive reaction inside recordDecision's bounded flush path (two-ring drop-oldest cap 5000/20000) with no self-scheduled tick/timer loop; provenance recording is a per-decision-event append, not a self-triggered controller.
